case_title: YOUNG KANG ET AL VS. CAREERUP INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KANG, YOUNG KANG, KENNY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAREERUP INC. $3,620.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,695.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,702.00 FILED BY KANG, YOUNG KANG, KENNY AS TO DEFENDANT CAREERUP INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CALEB KAUFFMAN, PRESIDENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
